---
title: "C. Evidence + Telemetry"
subtitle: "Drift engine, telemetry, KSI, ScubaGear, signed provenance chain"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: compliance
sub-category: C
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# C. Evidence + Telemetry {.unnumbered}

The continuous evidentiary pipeline. Every governance assertion must
have a signed, provenanced artifact behind it. The drift detection engine
catches divergence in real time; the telemetry model emits it; KSI + SCuBA
evidence feed it into federal pipelines.

## Leaves

- **C.1** Governance Telemetry Model (MOD_X)
- **C.2** KSI (Key Security Indicators)
- **C.3** ScubaGear evidence pipeline — [adapter](../../adapter-specs/scubagear/scubagear.qmd)
- **C.4** Drift Detection Engine (MOD_M) — *primary home*
- **C.5** Governance OS State Machine (MOD_S)
- **C.6** Provenance chain / signed commits
- **C.7** SIEM forwarding — [adapter](../../adapter-specs/siem/siem.qmd)
